articles.title: “The Cheaper the Better,” Says Valve About its Steam Machine Pricing, but Don’t Expect a Price Decrease “Any Time Soon” - Wccftech
articles.description: The cheaper the better is Valve's official line for how it would like to price the Steam Machine, but don't expect it to happen soon.
articles.content: Valve revealed its price for the Steam Machine at the top of this week, and it was higher than players would've liked. The $1,049 price tag was also higher than what Valve would've liked too, as we'v… [+1979 chars]
